name: Ondo Short-Term US Government Treasuries
description: OUSG is a tokenized fund issued by Ondo Finance that provides blockchain-based exposure to short-term U.S. Treasury securities and related cash-equivalent instruments. The product is designed for qualified and institutional investors and supports on-chain minting, redemption, and transfer functionality subject to compliance restrictions. OUSG holdings include tokenized treasury and money market products from providers such as BlackRock, Franklin Templeton, Fidelity, and WisdomTree.
